circle.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(30, 30, 30); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 2;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(30, 30, 30); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 9.018;

text.style: white-space: pre; fill: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 28px;
